Video.summary: Explore the Art of Canvas Painting with nationally acclaimed artist Amit Dutt, winner of the Indian National Academy Award, Bombay Art Society All India Award and many other prestige awards for his unique canvases. Go on a journey with the renowned Indian painter and watch the art happen.
Video.title: Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting

Craft Room Crash: Making All Things Beautiful - The Crafty Chica

Video.summary: Alexis and Adam are in lifestyle shock: the arrival their son Hudson has meant that this formerly 'out and about' couple is now decidedly housebound but their 1980s kitchen just isn't happening anymore. It's neither practical nor beautiful so designer Samantha Pynn gives it an eco-friendly and stylish makeover. By taking out the dated metallic back-splash, lacquering their cabinets and updating the furnishings, Samantha converts an open kitchen and living area into a stunning space that is both functional for everyday use and glamorous enough for entertaining.
Video.title: Pure Design: Alexis & Adam's Kitchen

Image.alt: Pure Design: Alexis & Adam's Kitchen
Pure Design: Alexis & Adam's Kitchen

Video.summary: For many first-time homeowners, decorating - especially private spaces like the bedroom - is definitely last on the list. That's certainly the case for Tiffany, an up and coming PR executive. By refreshing some of Tiffany's vintage furniture and bringing in some modern pieces and sustainable choices, host Samantha Pynn takes Tiffany's dorm-like bedroom with its mish-mash of furnishings and transforms it into an eclectic and soothing space, full of the sophistication a professional woman deserves.
Video.title: Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom

Image.alt: Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom
Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom

FaveCrafts: Pretty Pendant Charm Necklace Wine Cork Craft

Video.summary: Have you always wanted to learn how to Crochet? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get started and then move you onb to some simple projects such as making bunting and a crochet basket. You will find out what equipment you'll need, learn different crochet stitches and look at finishing techniques.
Video.title: Learn to Crochet

Image.alt: Learn to Crochet
Learn to Crochet

Video.summary: While picking out the perfect gift for dad can be tempting, sometimes a gift card is an even better idea. As they say, it is the thought that counts! With this Toolbox Fathers Day Craft, you can learn how to make the perfect gift for dad. By creating a DIY craft to keep the gift card tucked into, you give your dad some handmade love and something useful at the same time. Plus, you could easily use this homemade box to wrap up some homemade candies, as well.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft
FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Video.summary: Learn how to make a cool spa gifts collection in a jar.

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: DIY Spa Gifts in a Jar

Video.summary: For todays Frog Food we are going to draw some eyes! Sit back and relax with me while I break down the general shape, different angles and linear tips. So get your art supplies and get ready to draw!!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: How to Draw Eyes Tutorial

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: How to Draw Eyes Tutorial
Digital Painting - Frog Food: How to Draw Eyes Tutorial

Video.summary: Need another Dollhouse for your Dolls? Check out this Fabulous Craft that wont break the bank! We made a Dollar Store Dollhouse PLUS a Doll Bed, Rug and Fuzzy Doll Chair all for under 10 Bucks at the Dollar Store! This craft also makes a great gift!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make Dollar Store Doll Crafts - Doll Bed - Cute Rug - Fuzzy Chair

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make Dollar Store Doll Crafts - Doll Bed - Cute Rug - Fuzzy Chair
My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make Dollar Store Doll Crafts - Doll Bed - Cute Rug - Fuzzy Chair

Video.summary: Sometimes it can really be a challenge finding the exact style you want from a headband. This Fleece Flower DIY Headband shows you how you can make the perfect floral headband just the way you want. This DIY headband project is the perfect flirty and girly headband that makes a great DIY gift too. If you have a friend that loves flowers, or are even contemplating what to get your flower girl in your wedding make them this handmade headband and they will be in love!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband
FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband

Video.summary: Need a last minute gift idea!? Check out this Fabulous and EASY Doll Craft! Stay warm this Winter with these Fabsome Fuzzy Doll Slippers! Your dolls will LOVE these fabulous slippers and they make the perfect last minute gift on a budget!!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Fuzzy Doll Slippers EASY & Quick

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Fuzzy Doll Slippers EASY & Quick
My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Fuzzy Doll Slippers EASY & Quick
